name: Gothic Lattice Outdoor Sconce
description: Tall tapered wall sconce with matte black iron frame featuring interlocking oval lattice pattern and frosted glass panels. Crown-top finial. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a front door or entry gate for a grand exterior statement. Also works in tall stairwells or double-height foyers indoors.

name: Amber Hurricane Scroll Sconce
description: Single-arm wall sconce with S-curve scrollwork in dark patina iron, holding a hammered amber glass hurricane shade. Ring mount at top.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a mirror or artwork. The amber glass casts a warm glow — ideal for hallways, bedrooms, or powder rooms. Small enough for narrow walls.

name: Outdoor Torch Hurricane Sconce
description: Torch-style outdoor wall sconce with elongated S-scroll arm and clear glass hurricane shade. Mounted on an exposed brick wall in a showroom setting.
placementNotes: Designed for outdoor use — terraces, porticos, garden walls. Use in pairs flanking a door. The elongated arm projects well from the wall to light pathways.

name: Brass Cylinder Vanity Light
description: Long horizontal wall light with three segments — matte black cylinders alternating with a central polished brass filigree band. Modern yet ornate.
placementNotes: Perfect above a bathroom vanity mirror or over a bar console. The horizontal orientation suits wide walls. Mount at eye level for best effect.

name: Baroque Amber Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with ornate acanthus leaf baroque backplate in antique brass, holding two upward-facing hammered amber glass hurricane shades.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a fireplace, large mirror, or painting. The double arms provide generous light spread. Matches well with brass chandelier collections.

name: Baroque Crystal Shade Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with heavily distressed bronze-gold scrollwork frame, crystal drop accents, and cream empire-style fabric shades with braided trim.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a large mirror or artwork above a console. The fabric shades soften the ornate frame. Works well with Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Brushed Brass Modern Torch
description: Minimalist single-arm wall sconce with rectangular brushed brass backplate and cylindrical torch-style light holder with knurled base detail. Clean, modern lines.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a bed headboard, bathroom mirror, or hallway artwork. The small footprint suits narrow walls. Clean lines pair with modern interiors.

name: Brass Ribbed Globe Sconce
description: Elegant wall sconce with polished brass arm extending from a gear-detailed round rosette, holding a ribbed clear glass globe shade. Tapered brass finial below.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a mirror or entryway. The ribbed glass creates beautiful light patterns on walls. The tapered finial adds a regal touch.

name: Pleated Bell Silver Sconce
description: Slim single-arm wall sconce with a distressed silver iron stem and pleated white bell-shaped fabric shade. Compact and understated.
placementNotes: Ideal for bedrooms flanking a headboard or in a narrow hallway. The small footprint and soft fabric shade keep things understated.

name: Ornate Brass Double Shade Sconce
description: Grand two-arm wall sconce with heavily ornate fluted brass body, acanthus leaf detailing, scrolled arms, and scalloped cream fabric shades with braided trim.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a large mirror, fireplace, or painting on a large wall. The grand scale matches Heritage Shade chandeliers perfectly.

name: Twisted Brass Drum Sconce
description: Tall wall sconce with a twisted ribbon brass body extending from an ornate rosette, topped with a cream drum shade. Very elongated vertical form.
placementNotes: The tall vertical form suits high walls — pair two flanking a double-height foyer mirror or stairwell artwork. The twisted brass ribbon is a sculptural feature.

name: Dragon Phoenix Double Sconce
description: Highly ornate two-arm wall sconce with mythical dragon/phoenix figures holding amber glass hurricane shades. Elaborate shell and acanthus backplate.
placementNotes: A showstopper — use in pairs flanking a grand mirror or fireplace. The dragon motifs suit homes with Indian or Asian-inspired decor. Statement piece.

name: Fluted Column Wall Light
description: Tall vertical wall light with frosted ribbed/fluted glass cylinder capped with polished brass endcaps. Glows evenly when lit. Art Deco inspired.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a bathroom vanity mirror, bar area, or hallway. The vertical column casts soft, even light. Stunning on dark walls.

name: Iron Torch Drum Sconce
description: Tall torch-style wall sconce with hammered iron body in dark patina, topped with a cream drum shade. Long tapered stem with bulbed finial end.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a large painting or mirror. The hammered texture pairs well with textured walls. Tall form suits high-ceiling spaces.

name: Scrollwork Drum Accent Sconce
description: Wide horizontal wall sconce with laser-cut brass scrollwork extending symmetrically on both sides of a central cream drum shade. A dramatic horizontal accent.
placementNotes: Best as a centrepiece on a feature wall — above a headboard, sofa, or dining console. The wide horizontal spread needs a generous wall. Use a single unit.

name: Scroll Crystal Glass Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with S-scroll brass arms, floral rosette centre, clear glass hurricane shades, and dangling crystal drop accents.
placementNotes: Pair with Crystal Garden or Crystal Fringe chandeliers. Use two flanking a mirror or fireplace. The crystal drops add sparkle in evening light.

name: Industrial Gear Sconce
description: Industrial-style wall sconce with a cluster of interlocking cog/gear wheels as the backplate, extending a single arm with a white bell shade and exposed filament bulb. Delhi Brass branded.
placementNotes: A conversation piece — perfect for a bar area, study, or industrial-themed space. Use a single unit or pair above a bar counter. The gears are sculptural even when unlit.

name: Coral Reef Sconce
description: Coastal-inspired wall sconce with a coral/branch motif backplate in verdigris-distressed finish, extending a curved arm with a pleated cream shade.
placementNotes: Perfect for coastal or nature-inspired rooms. Use in pairs flanking a bedroom mirror or in a powder room. The verdigris finish adds character.

name: Moroccan Diamond Torch Sconce
description: Wall sconce with diamond-shaped filigree backplate in verdigris/distressed finish, holding an amber glass hurricane shade on a straight arm.
placementNotes: Works indoors or outdoors. Pair two flanking a doorway or use in a Moroccan-themed room. The verdigris patina adds an aged, earthy feel.

name: Crystal Grid Wall Sconce
description: Rounded rectangular wall sconce with a grid of rectangular and square crystal prisms set in a gilt brass frame. Creates dramatic refracted light patterns.
placementNotes: A jewel-like accent. Use in pairs flanking a powder room mirror or a foyer console. The crystal grid casts prismatic patterns when lit.

name: Moon Globe Brass Sconce
description: Minimalist wall sconce with a curved antique brass gooseneck arm holding a frosted white moon-effect glass globe. Soft, diffused lunar glow. Delhi Brass branded.
placementNotes: Beautiful as a bedside reading light or in a hallway. The frosted moon globe creates a gentle ambient glow. Works solo or in pairs.

name: Lotus Leaf Double Bell Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with a rectangular lotus-engraved brass backplate, ring-loop arms, and upward-facing amber tulip glass shades.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a puja area, console table, or large mirror. The lotus motif adds an Indian heritage touch while remaining versatile.

name: Brass Torchiere Shade Sconce
description: Tall single-arm wall sconce with polished brass turned stem and round rosette mount, topped with a small scalloped cream fabric shade.
placementNotes: A timeless classical sconce. Use in pairs flanking a mirror or in a series down a long hallway. Works with Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Geometric Circle Panel Sconce
description: Rectangular wall sconce with frosted glass panel overlaid with a brushed brass interlocking circles geometric pattern. Modern Art Deco aesthetic.
placementNotes: Clean and modern — perfect for contemporary corridors, powder rooms, or as a pair flanking a vanity mirror. The geometric pattern reads beautifully when backlit.

name: Distressed Scroll Frosted Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with elaborate distressed white-silver scrollwork and upward-facing frosted alabaster glass shades with lattice holders.
placementNotes: Matches the Distressed Scroll chandelier collection. Use in pairs to complement the Baroque or Shield chandeliers. Suits white or cream interiors.

name: Baroque Candelabra Sconce
description: Two-arm candelabra wall sconce with elaborate baroque scrollwork and floral repousse backplate. Exposed candle bulbs. Heavy cast brass.
placementNotes: A heritage statement. Use in pairs flanking a grand mirror or fireplace. No shade needed — the ornate brass is the feature. Matches ornate brass chandeliers.

name: Rustic Scroll Hurricane Sconce
description: Wall sconce with hammered iron scrollwork backplate in dark rustic patina and a clear glass cylinder hurricane shade. Exposed filament bulb creates warm glow.
placementNotes: Suited for rustic, industrial, or outdoor spaces. Pair two on a brick or stone wall flanking a doorway. The hammered texture adds character.

name: Noir Scroll Crystal Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with elaborate matte black iron scrollwork, leaf accents, exposed candle bulbs, and dangling crystal drops. Dark romantic aesthetic.
placementNotes: Pairs with the Noir Crystal chandelier collection. Use flanking a dark feature wall or mirror. The black iron and crystal contrast creates moody drama.

name: Crystal Prism Leaf Sconce
description: Wall sconce with acanthus leaf brass arms curving upward, supporting tiers of hanging crystal prism spears. Rectangular brass backplate.
placementNotes: Matches Prism Tier and crystal chandelier collections. The crystal spears catch light beautifully — use flanking a mirror for maximum sparkle.

name: Botanical Brass Hurricane Sconce
description: Single-arm wall sconce with botanical leaf-scroll brass arm extending from a round rosette, holding a clear glass hurricane shade. Warm brass patina.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking artwork or a mirror. The botanical brass detailing and clear glass create a warm, classic look suitable for most interiors.

name: Filigree Amber Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with intricate filigree scrollwork backplate in antique brass, holding two upward-facing amber hammered glass shades.
placementNotes: Pairs with Baroque Amber Double Sconce in style. Use flanking a mirror or painting. The filigree backplate is ornate enough to be a feature even unlit.

name: Crystal Candelabra Floor Lamp
description: Grand floor lamp with ornate antique brass candelabra base featuring multiple scrolled arms, crystal bead swags, and crystal drops. Fluted brass pole.
placementNotes: A statement floor lamp for a grand living room corner or beside a chaise. Matches crystal chandelier collections. Needs open space around it.

name: Iron Scroll Floor Lamp
description: Floor lamp with a matte black wrought iron tripod base featuring scrollwork and fleur-de-lis detailing. Topped with a large cream bell-shaped fabric shade.
placementNotes: Place beside a sofa, armchair, or bed. The wrought iron scrollwork pairs with rustic or traditional interiors. The tripod base needs open floor space.

name: Hammered Brass Picture Light
description: Long tubular wall light in hammered antique brass, designed as a picture light or vanity light. Horizontal tube with brass end mounts.
placementNotes: Mount above a painting, mirror, or bookshelf for directed downlight. The hammered texture adds warmth. Also works as a vanity light.

name: Twin Rod Floor Lamp
description: Minimalist floor lamp with two parallel dark patina iron rods rising from a simple base, topped with a large cream rectangular drum shade.
placementNotes: Clean, modern floor lamp for beside a sofa or reading chair. The twin-rod design is slim enough for tight corners.

name: Pagoda Outdoor Wall Lantern
description: Small pagoda-topped outdoor wall lantern with hammered dark iron body and frosted glass panels. Rustic, weathered character. Suitable for exterior walls.
placementNotes: Mount on exterior walls flanking a garden door or gate. The pagoda top and hammered finish suit farmhouse or colonial exteriors.

name: Tripod Drum Floor Lamp
description: Floor lamp with a matte black four-legged tripod iron base and a large ribbed cream/linen drum shade. Mid-century modern aesthetic.
placementNotes: A versatile modern floor lamp. Place beside a sofa or armchair. The ribbed drum shade casts soft, even light.

name: Empire Crystal Wall Lantern
description: Grand wall-mounted lantern with urn-shaped cut crystal body, ornate brass crown with eagle finial, ribbon bow swags, and a pointed base finial. French Empire style.
placementNotes: A showpiece wall lantern for grand interiors. Use flanking a double-height foyer mirror or stairwell. The cut crystal body glows beautifully when lit.

name: Outdoor Iron Torch Sconce
description: Outdoor wall sconce with diamond-pattern filigree iron backplate and spike lance bottom, holding an amber glass hurricane cup at top. Installed on an exterior textured wall.
placementNotes: Designed for exterior use. Mount flanking a main entrance or garden wall. The diamond backplate and torch form create a traditional Indian outdoor lighting look.

name: Corten Steel Geometric Sculpture
description: Large-scale outdoor sculpture composed of interlocking geometric polyhedron forms in corten (weathering) steel with natural rust patina. Abstract, contemporary art piece.
placementNotes: Garden or driveway focal sculpture. The corten steel weathers naturally and develops deeper patina over time. Needs a stone or gravel plinth base.

name: Corten Steel Angular Sculpture
description: Large outdoor abstract sculpture with angular interlocking planes and cantilevers in corten steel. Bold architectural statement piece.
placementNotes: Statement outdoor sculpture for a garden, corporate campus, or hotel entrance. Place on a circular gravel bed for maximum visual impact.

name: Cut Crystal Chandelier Table Lamp
description: A spectacular table lamp featuring a fully faceted cut-crystal domed shade, a slender crystal column stem, and a wide crystal base. An ornate matte-black cast iron band with scrollwork separates the dome from a tiered fringe of long cut-crystal spear pendants. The lamp radiates warm prismatic light, making it an instant focal piece.
placementNotes: Best on a side table or console in a formal living room or grand foyer. Pairs beautifully with a large mirror behind it.

name: Ceramic Sphere Floral Drum Lamp
description: A sculptural white matte ceramic sphere base paired with a cheerful botanical drum shade printed with colourful garden flowers — daisies, sunflowers, and wildflowers on an ivory ground. The brass connector ring and warm ambient glow give it an eclectic, artistic personality. The bold floral print shade makes this lamp a standalone art object.
placementNotes: Works beautifully on a side table, bedside table, or eclectic reading nook. The bold floral shade calls for neutral surrounding decor.

name: Purple Glass Urn Table Lamp
description: A large, jewel-toned amethyst purple glass urn base sits on a brushed gold brass disc, topped with a wide empire linen shade with a subtle gold trim edge. The deep purple glass body glows richly in daylight, creating a statement bedside or console lamp with regal presence. The neutral linen shade keeps the overall composition balanced.
placementNotes: Perfect on a bedside table or console table in a master suite. The deep purple base pairs best with cream or neutral bedding.

name: Smoked Glass Disc Table Lamp
description: A low, disc-shaped smoked glass base with an all-over diamond facet texture sits on a polished brass ring mount. The wide white empire shade gives the lamp a soft, diffused light. The flattened mushroom silhouette of the base is modern and sculptural, providing a sophisticated bedside or living room accent.
placementNotes: Excellent on a side table next to a sofa or as a bedside lamp. The squat base proportions work well under low headboards.

name: Moroccan Filigree Brass Table Lamp
description: An intricate Moroccan-style table lamp with an engraved and pierced filigree brass shade that casts mesmerising geometric light patterns. The bulbous base and slender column are covered in the same fine hand-worked metalwork, finished in an antique silver-brass tone. Crystal bead fringing edges the conical shade, adding delicate sparkle.
placementNotes: Best displayed on a bedside table or console where its projected light patterns can be appreciated on walls and ceilings. Particularly beautiful in rooms with neutral tones.

name: Hammered Brass Cylinder Table Lamp
description: A solid, straight-sided cylinder base in hand-hammered brushed brass with a warm satin gold finish. The cylindrical form is chunky and grounded, topped with a gently flared empire fabric shade in warm ivory. A slim brass rod connects base to shade, giving it a clean, understated architectural silhouette.
placementNotes: Versatile for a bedside table, study desk, or console table. Works in both traditional and contemporary interiors.

name: Carved Wood Urn Table Lamp
description: A stately table lamp with a classically proportioned urn base hand-carved from natural bleached wood, featuring fluted shoulders and a stepped square pedestal foot. The warm natural grain is left exposed and lightly whitewashed. A generously proportioned white linen drum shade completes the look, balancing rustic character with clean modern lines.
placementNotes: A strong statement lamp for a console table in a foyer or living room. The natural wood base suits both contemporary and heritage interiors.

name: Hammered Brass Oval Table Lamp
description: A sleek, tall oval-shaped base in hand-hammered brushed gold brass with bold faceted planes that catch the light beautifully. The geometric faceting gives it an Art Deco edge while the warm gold finish keeps it classic. A white linen drum shade sits proportionally atop a slim brass rod, completing an elegant, versatile table lamp.
placementNotes: Ideal on a bedside table, console, or side table. The angular facets make it particularly striking on a console with a mirror behind.

name: Brass Candelabra Bouillotte Table Lamp
description: A grand French-style bouillotte table lamp with a tall reeded brass column, three scrolled candelabra arms, and an ornate brass finial crown. The column rises from a heavily cast urn-form base and reeded foot. Available with two conical shade options: a dark chocolate fabric shade for a dramatic library look, and a warm grey-brown fabric shade for a more classical tone. The pierced brass gallery ring around the shade rim adds refined detail.
placementNotes: Perfect on a writing desk, library table, or as a pair flanking a sofa. The tall profile demands a generous table surface.

name: Repoussé Silver Surahi Table Lamp
description: A compact Indian-craft table lamp with a round, globular surahi-form base entirely covered in fine hand-worked repoussé silver-tone brass with dense floral scrollwork. A broad white linen drum shade in a proportional width gives the lamp balance. The intricate metalwork makes it a collector-quality artisan piece.
placementNotes: Works beautifully as a bedside lamp or on a console alongside Indian art objects. Small enough for a powder room shelf too.

name: Carved Elephant Temple Table Lamp
description: A dramatic artisan table lamp built around an architectural temple bracket fragment carved in natural mango wood, featuring two intricately detailed processional elephants in bas-relief beneath decorative foliage. The antique wood carving is mounted on a dark iron spine and square base. A large rectangular white fabric shade sits above, creating a striking contrast between raw craftsmanship and clean contemporary form.
placementNotes: Best on a wide console or dining sideboard where the carved base can be appreciated at eye level. An ideal conversation piece in an Indian-heritage styled room.

name: Crystal Column Corinthian Table Lamp
description: A tall, elegant table lamp with a clear cut-crystal column stem topped by a gilded Corinthian capital in antique brass. The square black lacquered base with claw feet grounds the piece with drama. A wide pleated empire shade in cream fabric sits high on the column, creating a graceful silhouette reminiscent of Classical European table lamps.
placementNotes: Suited to a study desk, side table in a formal sitting room, or as a pair flanking a console. The height and classical detailing make it ideal for rooms with high ceilings.

name: Clear Globe Glass Table Lamp
description: A large, perfectly spherical clear glass globe base on a polished brass disc foot, with a slender brass rod running through the centre. The oversize transparent orb creates a light, airy foundation that lets the interior and floor show through. A wide dark navy drum shade provides a bold graphic contrast, making this a contemporary design statement lamp.
placementNotes: Best on a side table or console where its transparent base can be seen from multiple angles. Ideal in a contemporary room with dark or navy accent walls.

name: Hammered Brass Sphere Table Lamp
description: A bold spherical base in hand-hammered antique brass with a rich all-over pebble texture, mounted on a wide brass disc plinth. The lamp is offered with two shade options — a dark grey pleated drum shade for a moody, dramatic look, and a cream pleated empire shade for a warmer, classic feel. The substantial weight and hand-worked surface give it an heirloom quality.
placementNotes: Makes a bold statement on a side table or console. The weighty globe base anchors a room; pair with low upholstered seating for best proportions.

name: Hammered Brass Grand Urn Table Lamp
description: An impressively large table lamp with a bulbous hammered brass urn base in a warm antiqued copper-gold tone. The all-over hand-hammered surface creates a rich tactile depth. A large white linen drum shade in generous proportions balances the massive base. This lamp commands attention and is designed for spaces that can accommodate its scale.
placementNotes: Designed for large console tables, sideboards, or floor placement in a grand foyer. Needs a wide, stable surface given its substantial base.

name: Cement Texture Urn Table Lamp
description: A tall, slender urn-form lamp base finished in a convincing grey concrete or plaster texture with subtle surface variation. The matte grey body sits on a brushed steel base ring. A large white pleated empire shade softens the industrial edge and brings warmth. A modern, understated piece that suits minimal and transitional interiors equally.
placementNotes: Well-suited to a study bookshelf, minimalist console, or as a floor-standing lamp in an open-plan living space. Pairs with raw linen, concrete, and oak furniture.

name: Ribbed Sand Ceramic Urn Table Lamp
description: A generously proportioned ceramic urn base in warm sandy beige with a finely ribbed vertical surface texture, sitting on a polished brass ring foot. The classic urn silhouette is both timeless and approachable. A wide white pleated empire shade in ivory fabric crowns the base, producing a warm, diffused glow perfect for ambient bedroom or living room lighting.
placementNotes: An excellent bedside table lamp or console accent. The warm neutral tones suit almost any colour palette, from all-white rooms to earthy, layered interiors.

name: Chalk White Plaster Urn Table Lamp
description: A beautiful artisan-finish lamp base shaped as a rounded urn in chalky white plaster with a deliberately imperfect, hand-applied surface showing subtle organic texture and variation. A slim brass neck ring connects to a tall slender stem. The pleated ivory empire shade adds a gentle softness. This lamp has a quiet, meditative beauty ideal for spa-like and calm interiors.
placementNotes: A serene choice for a bedside table or bathroom vanity console. Works best in white, beige, or terracotta-toned rooms.

name: Turned Wood Sphere Table Lamp
description: A rustic, tactile table lamp with a substantial round sphere base turned from solid reclaimed wood, showing natural grain variation and a lightly oiled natural finish. The dark drum shade in charcoal fabric adds a moody, grounded quality. An earthy, organic piece for interiors that celebrate natural materials.
placementNotes: Works on a side table, reading nook shelf, or desk. Pairs well with leather seating, linen soft furnishings, and raw wood furniture.

name: Ribbed Amber Glass Urn Table Lamp
description: A large, elegant urn-form base in ribbed dark amber glass with a gradient that deepens towards the base. The vertical ribbing creates a strong graphic pattern that catches warm light beautifully. A polished brass disc mount and ring foot frame the glass. A wide white linen drum shade in drum form provides a clean, understated crown.
placementNotes: Best on a console, side table, or bar cabinet. The dark amber glass glows magnificently at dusk and pairs well with warm metallic and jewel-toned interiors.

name: Brushed Silver Cylinder Table Lamp
description: A tall, architectural cylinder lamp base in brushed silver-grey metal with a fine linear brushed texture. The clean geometric cylinder form is topped with a polished silver disc and a slim rod. Available with a dark charcoal drum shade for a dramatic look or a white drum shade for a lighter, contemporary feel. The simple geometry suits modern and transitional interiors equally.
placementNotes: Ideal on a console table, desk, or as a floor lamp in an open living space. The tall, slim profile suits narrow surfaces and modern shelf displays.

name: Teal Pebble-Texture Cylinder Table Lamp
description: A tall, eye-catching cylinder base in deep teal with an all-over hammered pebble surface texture that creates depth and visual interest. The jewel-green body sits on a brass ring foot. The large drum shade features a hand block-printed cotton fabric with a classic blue and gold Indian floral motif on an ivory ground, making this a truly crafted, India-story lamp.
placementNotes: A statement piece for an Indian-heritage or eclectic interior. Best on a console or side table where the bold shade pattern can be appreciated up close.

name: Fossil-Texture Urn Table Lamp
description: A tall, slender urn-form lamp base with a hand-applied terracotta-earth finish featuring layered burnt-sienna, ochre and charcoal tones that mimic weathered stone or fossil rock. The raw, artisanal surface has strong visual presence. A wide textured burlap-weave drum shade with a metallic thread adds warmth and pairs the lamp naturally with earthy, organic interiors.
placementNotes: Works on a console in a rustic or eclectic living room or in a warm study. The earthy base suits interiors with natural stone, jute, and terracotta accents.

name: Bronze Dancing Figures Table Lamp
description: An artistic sculptural table lamp with a base formed from three intertwined dancing human figures cast in dark matte bronze, evoking classical Indian or Art Nouveau sculpture. The figures reach upward to support the lamp fitting. A simple cream conical fabric shade keeps focus on the sculptural base. A unique collector's piece for those who value art as much as light.
placementNotes: Best displayed as a feature piece on a writing desk, bookshelf, or bar cabinet where the sculptural base can be appreciated close-up. Not for high-traffic surfaces.

name: Brushed Gold Cylinder Table Lamp
description: A compact, straight-sided cylinder lamp base in warm brushed gold metal with a fine linear texture, sitting on a polished brass ring disc. The geometry is clean and modern. A dark charcoal or black conical fabric shade with a gold trim edge creates a sophisticated, high-contrast pairing that suits both contemporary and glamorous interiors.
placementNotes: A versatile bedside or study desk lamp. The compact proportions suit smaller tables and nightstands. Works as a pair for symmetrical bedside arrangements.

name: Honeycomb Ceramic Urn Table Lamp
description: A substantial barrel-urn ceramic lamp base entirely covered in a raised honeycomb or cobblestone relief pattern in warm beige-taupe tones. The three-dimensional surface texture is deeply tactile and catches directional light beautifully. A wide ivory empire shade with gentle pleating provides a warm, diffused light and a calm, natural aesthetic.
placementNotes: An excellent console or side-table lamp. The tactile surface is a natural conversation starter; place it where guests can appreciate the detail up close.
